prestazioni: Forced induction conversion using the 3ZR-FE (2.0L) engine with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium tip, and a HKS Super SQV4 blow-off valve to manage boost pressure at 1.2 bar (17.4 psi).
Full standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom-mapped fuel and ignition tables, paired with ID1000x injectors and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump to support E85 flex-fuel capability.

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Blade Master G’s 2,700mm wheelbase, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering.
estetica: Vertex Japan ‘Edge’ widebody kit, extending the rear fenders by 50mm and the front by 40mm to accommodate Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) with Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear).

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a 30mm vented scoop for improved intercooler airflow, paired with a custom rear diffuser from Veilside Japan, featuring integrated carbon fiber strakes and a central exhaust cutout for the Tomei exhaust.

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, FIA-approved), Takata Drift Series 4-point harnesses, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, all wrapped in Alcantara with red contrast stitching.
